body:
## English
### Summary
This PR improves the PvE Leaderboard page UI and responsive layout.
### Changes
- Added responsive layout support for smaller screens
- Improved sidebar scaling and spacing
- Adjusted leaderboard content width and alignment
- Enhanced button styles and visual consistency
- Added animated fantasy background support
- Refined typography and leaderboard visual hierarchy
- Improved small-screen layout consistency without changing desktop layout
### Notes
- Desktop layout remains unchanged
- Focused on responsive visual improvements only
- No gameplay logic changes

---
## 中文
### 更新内容
本次 PR 主要优化 PvE Leaderboard 页面视觉与响应式布局。
### 修改内容
- 增加小屏幕自适应布局
- 优化左侧边栏尺寸与间距
- 调整排行榜主体区域宽度与对齐
- 优化按钮视觉效果与统一性
- 增加幻想风格动态背景支持
- 优化字体与排行榜视觉层级
- 在不修改大屏布局的前提下提升小屏一致性
### 说明
- 不修改 desktop 原有布局
- 本次主要为 UI / responsive 优化
- 不涉及核心游戏逻辑修改
title: feat: improve leaderboard responsive layout and ui polish
